name: Chicken Kotletki with Sour Cream Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Skinless, boneless chicken breasts, ground
Cayenne pepper, nutmeg and black pepper
recipeInstructions:
Filling: Melt butter in a skillet and over medium-high heat. Saute mushrooms with salt and a pinch of pepper until mushrooms are browned and liquid has evaporated. Remove one tablespoon of mushrooms to add to the sauce and reserve the rest for filling the kotletki patties.
Patties: In a large bowl, mix together 1 cup of the breadcrumbs and the cream. Combine with the chicken, egg, salt, and a pinch each of cayenne, nutmeg, and pepper. Spread remaining crumbs in a shallow pan. Divide chicken mixture into 8 portions. With wet hands, form each portion into an oblong patty. Flatten slightly and place 1/8 of the mushroom filling in the center. Fold over and pat chicken around the filling. Roll each patty gently in bread crumbs and place on waxed paper-lined tray. Repeat with remaining chicken and filling to make 8 patties. Cover and chill the patties.
Sauce: Meanwhile, in a small saucepan, melt butter and cook onions without browning for 2-3 minutes. Add cream, increase heat to high and cook, stirring constantly, until cream thickens slightly. Reduce heat to low, add vinegar, sour cream, and salt. Heat through, but do not boil. Add reserved mushroom filling. Taste and adjust seasoning. Serve each kotletki napped with a spoonful of sauce and garnished with watercress. Accompany with Kasha.
